task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: for category AM, applies only if required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: for category AM, applies only if required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Undergo a medical examination for categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

conditions.condition: applying for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E
regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination before renewal

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed

exception.description: for category AM, applies only if required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: Require applicant to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
not otherwise provided for by Annex III

exception.description: does not apply to the appropriate assessment of eyesight in accordance with Annex III, point 3

conditions.condition: if required by Member State under paragraph 3, point (a)
when applying for issuance or renewal of a driving licence

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
not otherwise provided for by Annex III

exception.description: does not apply to the appropriate assessment of eyesight in accordance with Annex III, point 3

task.label: Provide for appropriate measures to address non-compliance
Apply alternative measure for monitoring fitness to drive

conditions.condition: alternative measure under paragraph 3, point (b), has been established

task.label: Ensure that applicant undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: if, on the basis of information acquired pursuant to the alternative measures in paragraph 3, it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed in Annex III
prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

task.label: Undergo a medical examination prior to issuance or renewal

conditions.condition: if, on the basis of information acquired pursuant to the alternative measures in paragraph 3, it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed in Annex III
prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness and improve knowledge about minimum fitness standards
Inform the Commission of adopted guidelines

conditions.condition: if guidelines for medical practitioners are adopted

task.label: Make guidelines available to other Member States

conditions.condition: if informed by Member State of adopted guidelines

task.label: Inform the Commission of public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: if public awareness campaigns are developed

task.label: Make campaign information available to other Member States

conditions.condition: if informed by Member State of public awareness campaigns

task.label: Set stricter standards than those in Annex III
